name: Northern Reach Tundra
description: Amber-lit reconstructed Pleistocene steppe beneath Archive-cyan aurora telemetry.

name: Dire-Wolf Forest
description: Cold forest-edge sanctuary corridor calibrated for canids, cervids, raptors, and ambush predators.

name: Reconstructed Megafauna Grassland
description: Open grazing habitat with containment-field plinths and herd behavior monitoring.

name: Ancient Seas Archive
description: Holographic marine basin for sharks, armored fish, sea cows, and deep-time marine branches.

name: Fossil Beds Laboratory
description: Tier IV reconstruction lattice for Cambrian, Paleozoic, and Jurassic fossil records.

name: Wildborn Frontier
description: Recovered boundary zone where living systems stabilize beyond the old sanctuary perimeter.
